summary: Full MVP testing of SmashDine platform - first test run. All 21 backend API tests passed. All critical customer and owner flows tested via Playwright and verified visually. App is in excellent working condition.

ui_bugs.issue: After clicking 'View' on a table QR code, the QR image does not appear as an with data:image src - it may render in a modal but wasn't visible in screenshot. Download button shows correctly.

issues: Placeholder QR icon on each table card (before View is clicked) uses low-opacity styling which looks like a broken image - by design but could confuse users

action_items: Minor: Verify QR preview modal renders the actual QR image correctly (may be a Playwright screenshot timing issue rather than a real bug - backend API confirmed working)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 590 lines - borderline but acceptable for MVP
FRONTEND_URL hardcoded in server.py line 272 as fallback - already uses env var with sensible default so acceptable
Game result POST (line 467) returns existing result with '_id': None hack instead of clean to_str_id - minor issue
seed_data_creation: Test orders created: ORD-HN2U-41VQ, ORD-7REO-L4VL, ORD-LWA8-NO8C, ORD-BGQS-B98N, ORD-U0IS-22NP
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested and working. Backend 100% pass. Customer flow (menu → cart → checkout → payment → game → order tracking) all working. Owner flow (login → dashboard → live orders → menu management → QR codes → analytics) all working. Payment is MOCKED - always succeeds. Game intro works, canvas game starts on 'Start Game!' click. Minor QR preview visual concern.
rca_of_issues: QR image not found via img[src*='data:image'] selector - possibly the QR preview modal was not visible in the viewport when screenshot was taken, or image is loaded lazily. Backend /api/qr/{restaurant_id}/{table_number} confirmed returning valid base64 PNG.
